problem: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: If Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure is applied to quantum, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
